prompt:
You are a document understanding assistant.

Analyze the attached image carefully. The image may contain:
- multiple text columns
- one or more structured tables
- handwritten notes that may be messy, slanted, or misspelled

Your tasks:
1. Extract every table as valid JSON.
   - Use the visible column headers as keys.
   - Return each row as a separate object in an array.
   - Preserve values exactly as written.
2. Extract multi-column printed text while preserving reading separation by column.
   - Return each column independently as column_1, column_2, etc.
   - Do not merge text from different columns.
3. Extract all handwritten text separately.
   - First transcribe exactly as written.
   - If there are spelling mistakes, add a corrected version in brackets.
4. Do not summarize.
5. If something is unclear, mark it as [unclear].

Return only valid JSON in this exact structure:
{
  "table": [...],
  "columns": {
    "column_1": "...",
    "column_2": "..."
  },
  "handwritten": {
    "raw": "...",
    "corrected": "..."
  }
}

columns.column_1:
THE GREEN PLANET INITIATIVE 🍃
Building a Sustainable Tomorrow

Our Mission
The Green Planet Initiative is a non-profit organization dedicated to creating a sustainable future through education, community engagement, and innovative solutions. We believe that small actions can lead to big changes.

What We Do
• Environmental Education
• Tree Plantation Drives
• Recycling Programs
• Community Cleanups
• Sustainable Living Workshops

--------------------------------
GET INVOLVED
Join us in making a difference! Visit our website or contact us to volunteer.

Contact Us
🌐 www.greenplanet.org
✉ info@greenplanet.org
📞 +1 (555) 123-4567
columns.column_2:
A GREENER FUTURE STARTS TODAY
Climate change is one of the biggest challenges of our time. Rising temperatures, plastic pollution, and deforestation threaten our planet and future generations.

Together, we can create a cleaner, greener, and healthier world. Every action counts!
columns.column_3:
VOLUNTEER STORIES
“Being part of the tree plantation drive was an amazing experience. It felt great to contribute to the environment.”
– Neha, Volunteer

“I learned so much about recycling and sustainable living. These workshops changed the way I think.”
– Arjun, Workshop Participant
